      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html lang="zh-CN">
      <head>
      <meta charset="UTF-8">
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
      <title>致那个爱笑的女孩 | 元旦快乐</title>
      <style>
      :root {
      /* 莫兰迪色系变量定义 */
      --dusty-blue: #7898af; /* 雾霾蓝 */
      --muted-lavender: #b0b1c7; /* 烟灰紫 */
      --slate-grey: #848ca0; /* 冷岩灰 */
      --misty-rose: #ffe4e1; /* 枯玫瑰 */
      --pale-sand: #f0f0f0; /* 米砂色 */
      --warm-beige: #e8e0d8; /* 温暖米色 */
      --soft-gold: #d4c4a8; /* 柔和金色 */
      --glass-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      --glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
      --shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
      --shadow-light: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      }
      * {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      }
      body {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Times New Roman', '宋体', 'SimSun', serif;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--dusty-blue), var(--slate-grey));
      color: var(--pale-sand);
      overflow-x: hidden;
      min-height: 100vh;
      user-select: none;
      -webkit-user-select: none;
      cursor: default;
      }
      /* 噪点纹理层 */
      .noise {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 50;
      opacity: 0.04;
      background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
      mix-blend-mode: overlay;
      }
      /* 极光容器 */
      .aurora-container {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
      z-index: 1;
      overflow: hidden;
      }
      /* 极光光斑 */
      .blob {
      position: absolute;
      border-radius: 50%;
      filter: blur(100px);
      opacity: 0.4;
      animation: float 30s infinite ease-in-out;
      }
      .blob-1 {
      top: -20%; left: -20%; width: 60vw; height: 60vw;
      background: var(--muted-lavender);
      animation-duration: 35s;
      }
      .blob-2 {
      bottom: -30%; right: -30%; width: 70vw; height: 70vw;
      background: var(--dusty-blue);
      animation-duration: 40s;
      animation-delay: -10s;
      }
      .blob-3 {
      top: 50%; left: -10%; width: 40vw; height: 40vw;
      background: var(--slate-grey);
      animation-duration: 45s;
      animation-delay: -20s;
      }
      @keyframes float {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
      25% { transform: translate(50px, -30px) scale(1.1) rotate(90deg); }
      50% { transform: translate(-20px, 50px) scale(0.9) rotate(180deg); }
      75% { transform: translate(30px, 20px) scale(1.05) rotate(270deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1) rotate(360deg); }
      }
      /* 主内容容器 */
      .container {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 10;
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 2rem;
      }
      /* 卡片样式 */
      .card {
      max-width: 600px;
      margin: 2rem auto;
      padding: 3rem;
      background: var(--glass-bg);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
      border-radius: 20px;
      box-shadow: 0 20px 40px var(--shadow);
      text-align: center;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(30px);
      transition: all 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
      }
      .card.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
      }
      .card h1 {
      font-size: 4rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      margin-bottom: 1rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      color: var(--misty-rose);
      }
      .card .subtitle {
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      margin-bottom: 2rem;
      opacity: 0.9;
      }
      .card p {
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      line-height: 2.2;
      margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
      opacity: 0.95;
      }
      .card .highlight {
      color: var(--muted-lavender);
      font-style: italic;
      }
      /* 樱花画布 */
      #sakuraCanvas {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      z-index: 5;
      pointer-events: none;
      }
      /* 音频控制按钮 */
      .audio-control {
      position: fixed;
      bottom: 2rem;
      right: 2rem;
      z-index: 20;
      width: 60px;
      height: 60px;
      background: var(--glass-bg);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
      border-radius: 50%;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 20px var(--shadow);
      }
      .audio-control:hover {
      transform: scale(1.1);
      background: var(--glass-border);
      }
      .audio-control::before {
      content: '♪';
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      color: var(--pale-sand);
      }
      .audio-control.playing::before {
      content: '♫';
      animation: pulse 1s infinite;
      }
      @keyframes pulse {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
      50% { opacity: 0.6; }
      }
      /* 鼠标跟随效果 */
      .cursor-trail {
      position: fixed;
      width: 6px;
      height: 6px;
      background: var(--misty-rose);
      border-radius: 50%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 15;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
      }
      /* 点击涟漪效果 */
      .ripple {
      position: fixed;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--muted-lavender);
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 15;
      animation: ripple 1s ease-out;
      }
      @keyframes ripple {
      0% {
      transform: scale(0);
      opacity: 0.6;
      }
      100% {
      transform: scale(4);
      opacity: 0;
      }
      }
      /* 星星背景 */
      .stars {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
      z-index: 2;
      pointer-events: none;
      }
      .star {
      position: absolute;
      background: var(--pearl-white);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: twinkle 3s infinite ease-in-out;
      box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
      }
      /* 心形浮动元素（改为更小、更含蓄的心符号） */
      .hearts {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
      z-index: 3;
      pointer-events: none;
      overflow: hidden;
      }
      .heart {
      position: absolute;
      color: var(--misty-rose);
      font-size: 0.9rem; /* 更小、更低调 */
      animation: float-up 9s linear infinite;
      opacity: 0.45;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06));
      }
      @keyframes float-up {
      0% {
      transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(0deg);
      opacity: 0;
      }
      10% { opacity: 0.6; }
      90% { opacity: 0.6; }
      100% {
      transform: translateY(-100px) rotate(360deg);
      opacity: 0;
      }
      }
      /* 气泡效果 */
      .bubbles {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
      z-index: 2;
      pointer-events: none;
      overflow: hidden;
      }
      .bubble {
      position: absolute;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: bubble-rise 6s linear infinite;
      }
      .star:nth-child(odd) {
      animation-delay: -1s;
      }
      .star:nth-child(even) {
      animation-delay: -2s;
      }
      @keyframes twinkle {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(1); }
      50% { opacity: 0.9; transform: scale(1.3); }
      }
      @keyframes bubble-rise {
      0% {
      transform: translateY(100vh) scale(0);
      opacity: 0;
      }
      10% {
      opacity: 0.7;
      }
      90% {
      opacity: 0.7;
      }
      100% {
      transform: translateY(-100px) scale(1.5);
      opacity: 0;
      }
      }
      /* 倒计时样式 */
      .countdown {
      text-align: center;
      margin: 2rem 0;
      }
      .countdown-number {
      font-size: 3rem;
      font-weight: bold;
      color: var(--soft-gold);
      display: inline-block;
      margin: 0 1rem;
      }
      .countdown-label {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      opacity: 0.8;
      margin-top: 0.5rem;
      }
      /* 时间线样式 */
      .timeline {
      position: relative;
      max-width: 500px;
      margin: 2rem auto;
      }
      .timeline-item {
      margin: 2rem 0;
      padding-left: 2rem;
      position: relative;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateX(-30px);
      transition: all 1s ease;
      }
      .timeline-item.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateX(0);
      }
      .timeline-item::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: -10px;
      top: 10px;
      width: 12px;
      height: 12px;
      background: var(--muted-lavender);
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid var(--pale-sand);
      }
      .timeline-year {
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      color: var(--soft-gold);
      font-weight: bold;
      margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
      }
      .timeline-content {
      font-size: 1rem;
      line-height: 1.6;
      opacity: 0.9;
      }
      /* 愿望清单样式 */
      .wishlist {
      max-width: 500px;
      margin: 2rem auto;
      }
      .wish-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      margin: 1rem 0;
      padding: 1rem;
      background: var(--glass-bg);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
      border-radius: 10px;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
      transition: all 0.8s ease;
      }
      .wish-item.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
      }
      .wish-checkbox {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
      margin-right: 1rem;
      border: 2px solid var(--muted-lavender);
      border-radius: 4px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      }
      .wish-checkbox.checked {
      background: var(--muted-lavender);
      }
      .wish-checkbox.checked::after {
      content: '✓';
      color: var(--pale-sand);
      font-size: 14px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      }
      .wish-text {
      flex: 1;
      font-size: 1rem;
      opacity: 0.95;
      }
      /* 礼物盒动画 */
      .gift-container {
      position: fixed;
      bottom: 6rem;
      right: 2rem;
      z-index: 20;
      }
      .gift-box {
      width: 70px;
      height: 70px;
      background: var(--glass-bg);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
      border-radius: 12px;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 20px var(--shadow);
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      }
      .gift-box:hover {
      transform: scale(1.1);
      background: var(--glass-border);
      }
      .gift-box::before {
      content: '🎁';
      font-size: 2rem;
      z-index: 2;
      position: relative;
      }
      .gift-box.clicked::before {
      animation: bounce 0.6s ease;
      }
      @keyframes bounce {
      0%, 20%, 50%, 80%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
      40% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
      60% { transform: translateY(-5px); }
      }
      .gift-particles {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 1;
      }
      .particle {
      position: absolute;
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      background: var(--misty-rose);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: particle-explode 1s ease-out forwards;
      }
      @keyframes particle-explode {
      0% {
      transform: scale(0) rotate(0deg);
      opacity: 1;
      }
      100% {
      transform: scale(1) rotate(360deg) translate(var(--tx), var(--ty));
      opacity: 0;
      }
      }
      /* 照片墙样式 */
      .photo-wall {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr));
      gap: 1rem;
      max-width: 600px;
      margin: 2rem auto;
      }
      .photo-item {
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      background: var(--glass-bg);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
      border-radius: 12px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-direction: column;
      padding: 0.6rem;
      gap: 0.6rem;
      font-size: 1rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: scale(0.8) rotate(10deg);
      }
      .photo-item.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg);
      }
      .photo-item:hover {
      transform: scale(1.05);
      background: var(--glass-border);
      }
      /* Polaroid-style mini photo inside photo-item */
      .polaroid-img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 0;
      padding-bottom: 75%;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.95), rgba(245,245,245,0.95));
      border-radius: 8px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 3rem; /* 更大的表情尺寸 */
      color: #666;
      box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
      }
      .polaroid-caption {
      width: 100%;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: var(--pale-sand);
      opacity: 0.9;
      margin-top: 0.2rem;
      }
      /* 温馨提示样式 */
      .hint-message {
      position: fixed;
      bottom: 1rem;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      background: var(--glass-bg);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
      border-radius: 25px;
      padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: var(--misty-rose);
      text-align: center;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 25px var(--shadow);
      z-index: 25;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: hint-appear 1s ease-out 2s forwards;
      }
      @keyframes hint-appear {
      0% {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(20px);
      }
      100% {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
      }
      }
      /* 响应式设计 */
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .card {
      margin: 1rem;
      padding: 2rem;
      }
      .card h1 {
      font-size: 2.5rem;
      }
      .card p {
      font-size: 1rem;
      line-height: 2;
      }
      .photo-wall {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      gap: 0.5rem;
      }
      .photo-item {
      font-size: 2rem;
      }
      .hint-message {
      bottom: 0.5rem;
      padding: 0.8rem 1.2rem;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      max-width: 90%;
      }
      }
      </style>
      </head>
      <body>
      <!-- 噪点纹理层 -->
      <div class="noise"></div>
      <!-- 极光背景 -->
      <div class="aurora-container">
      <div class="blob blob-1"></div>
      <div class="blob blob-2"></div>
      <div class="blob blob-3"></div>
      </div>
      <!-- 樱花画布 -->
      <canvas id="sakuraCanvas"></canvas>
      <!-- 鼠标跟随效果容器 -->
      <div id="cursor-container"></div>
      <!-- 星星背景 -->
      <div class="stars" id="stars"></div>
      <!-- 心形浮动 -->
      <div class="hearts" id="hearts"></div>
      <!-- 气泡效果 -->
      <div class="bubbles" id="bubbles"></div>
      <!-- 主内容 -->
      <div class="container">
      <!-- 标题卡片 -->
      <div class="card fade-in-section" id="card1">
      <h1>元旦快乐</h1>
      <p class="subtitle">请坐好小板凳，慢慢享用</p>
      <p>在这个二十来岁的年纪，我们都在经历着成长的喜悦与迷茫。</p>
      <p>我们是彼此生命中的同行者，相遇相知相识。</p>
      <!-- 倒计时 -->
      <div class="countdown" id="countdown">
      <div class="countdown-number" id="days">--</div>
      <div class="countdown-label">天</div>
      <div class="countdown-number" id="hours">--</div>
      <div class="countdown-label">时</div>
      <div class="countdown-number" id="minutes">--</div>
      <div class="countdown-label">分</div>
      <div class="countdown-number" id="seconds">--</div>
      <div class="countdown-label">秒</div>
      </div>
      <p style="font-size: 0.9rem; opacity: 0.8; margin-top: 1rem;">✨ 距离我们的新年还有...</p>
      </div>
      <!-- 我们的故事 -->
      <div class="card fade-in-section" id="card2">
      <h2 style="color: var(--soft-gold); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 1.8rem;">💫 我们的故事</h2>
      <p>还记得我们第一次见面时，那个暑假当时还蛮好奇的，第一次见面的印象就是挺好看的</p>
      <p>笑容灿烂得像春天的樱花一样。</p>
      <p class="highlight">从那一刻起，命运使然，慢慢多了接触，想送一个不一样的礼物。</p>
      <!-- 时间线 -->
      <div class="timeline">
      <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">相识的日子</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">还记得早上巨冷，骑个小电炉，酷酷去练车，天气真的超冷吧</div>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">一起的时候</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">聊的很来，那时候还挺多的，感觉很开心</div>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">后面的一段时间</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">你的课程好严，但是感觉好有意思，我不是很懂，但是感觉超级厉害，很有趣</div>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">A one-of-a-kind gift</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">但是想送一个不一样的礼物，但是不知道应该送什么，后来想了想，做了一份这个肯定独一无二了吧，其实我原本想再做一个类似于照片八音盒的，留在下一次吧</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <!-- 你的美好 -->
      <div class="card fade-in-section" id="card3">
      <h2 style="color: var(--soft-gold); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 1.8rem;">✨ 你所有的美好</h2>
      <p>你知道吗？有时候我看着你，</p>
      <p>就会觉得这个世界真的是温柔的。</p>
      <p class="highlight">你的笑容、你的坚持、你的善良，都让我相信美好是存在的。</p>
      <!-- 美好特质（更含蓄的文字/符号替代图标） -->
      <div class="photo-wall">
      <div class="photo-item" title="表情1">
      <div class="polaroid-img">😄</div>
      <div class="polaroid-caption">开心</div>
      </div>
      <div class="photo-item" title="表情2">
      <div class="polaroid-img">😁</div>
      <div class="polaroid-caption">快乐</div>
      </div>
      <div class="photo-item" title="表情3">
      <div class="polaroid-img">😅</div>
      <div class="polaroid-caption">无语嘻嘻</div>
      </div>
      <div class="photo-item" title="表情4">
      <div class="polaroid-img">😊</div>
      <div class="polaroid-caption">微笑</div>
      </div>
      <div class="photo-item" title="表情5">
      <div class="polaroid-img">😍</div>
      <div class="polaroid-caption">喜欢</div>
      </div>
      <div class="photo-item" title="表情6">
      <div class="polaroid-img">😇</div>
      <div class="polaroid-caption">略略略</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <!-- 2025的心愿 -->
      <div class="card fade-in-section" id="card4">
      <h2 style="color: var(--dusty-rose); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 1.8rem;">🎯 2025年的心愿</h2>
      <p style="font-size: 1.1rem;">新的一年，我想对你说：</p>
      <p style="font-size: 1.1rem;">愿你所有的梦想都能开花结果，</p>
      <p class="highlight" style="font-size: 1.1rem;">愿你永远被爱包围，被幸福环绕。</p>
      <!-- 心愿清单 -->
      <div class="wishlist">
      <div class="wish-item">
      <div class="wish-checkbox" onclick="toggleWish(this)"></div>
      <div class="wish-text">愿你新的一天，天天开心，事事顺心</div>
      </div>
      <div class="wish-item">
      <div class="wish-checkbox" onclick="toggleWish(this)"></div>
      <div class="wish-text">愿你的事业一帆风顺，充满成就感</div>
      </div>
      <div class="wish-item">
      <div class="wish-checkbox" onclick="toggleWish(this)"></div>
      <div class="wish-text">愿你保持那份纯真，永远相信美好</div>
      </div>
      <div class="wish-item">
      <div class="wish-checkbox" onclick="toggleWish(this)"></div>
      <div class="wish-text">愿你身体健康，每天都元气满满</div>
      </div>
      <div class="wish-item">
      <div class="wish-checkbox" onclick="toggleWish(this)"></div>
      <div class="wish-text">愿我们的友谊天长地久，永远温暖</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <!-- 最后的祝福 -->
      <div class="card fade-in-section" id="card5">
      <h2 style="color: var(--soft-gold); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 1.8rem;">💫 最后的祝福</h2>
      <p style="font-size: 1.2rem; color: var(--misty-rose); font-weight: 300;">亲爱的朋友，</p>
      <p>在这个二十来岁的年纪，我们都在经历着成长的喜悦与迷茫，</p>
      <p>但有你这样的朋友在身边，</p>
      <p>我觉得一切都变得温柔起来。</p>
      <p class="highlight" style="font-size: 1.2rem; margin-top: 1rem;">新年快乐！愿你被全世界温柔以待。</p>
      <p style="margin-top: 2rem; font-size: 0.9rem; opacity: 0.7;">✨ 用心制作，至于为啥到这结束了，当然是想留个悬念啦，嘻嘻 ✨</p>
      </div>
      </div>
      <!-- 音频控制按钮 -->
      <div class="audio-control" id="audioControl" title="点击播放背景音乐"></div>
      <!-- 礼物盒 -->
      <div class="gift-container">
      <div class="gift-box" id="giftBox" title="点击打开惊喜">
      <div class="gift-particles" id="giftParticles"></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <!-- 温馨提示 -->
      <div class="hint-message" id="hintMessage">
      <p>💫 亲爱的朋友，慢慢往下看哦，每一个字都写满了我的心意 💫</p>
      </div>
      <!-- 背景音乐 (Base64编码的轻音乐) -->
      <audio id="bgMusic" loop preload="auto">
      <source src="data:audio/mpeg;base64,/+MYxAAAAANIAAAAAExBTUUzLjk4LjIAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA" type="audio/mpeg">
      </audio>
      <script>
      // 生成星星背景
      function createStars() {
      const starsContainer = document.getElementById('stars');
      const numberOfStars = 50;
      for (let i = 0; i < numberOfStars; i++) {
      const star = document.createElement('div');
      star.className = 'star';
      star.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
      star.style.top = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
      star.style.width = Math.random() * 3 + 1 + 'px';
      star.style.height = star.style.width;
      star.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 3 + 's';
      starsContainer.appendChild(star);
      }
      }
      // 生成心形浮动效果（改为更小、更含蓄的符号）
      function createHearts() {
      const heartsContainer = document.getElementById('hearts');
      const numberOfHearts = 8;
      // 使用小星星/花瓣符号，更含蓄且与极光/樱花主题协调
      const heartSymbols = ['✦', '✧', '❀', '✺'];
      for (let i = 0; i < numberOfHearts; i++) {
      const heart = document.createElement('div');
      heart.className = 'heart';
      heart.textContent = heartSymbols[Math.floor(Math.random() * heartSymbols.length)];
      heart.style.left = (5 + Math.random() * 90) + '%';
      // 保持小字号，低调优雅
      heart.style.fontSize = (0.8 + Math.random() * 0.6) + 'rem';
      heart.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 6 + 's';
      heart.style.animationDuration = (Math.random() * 4 + 8) + 's';
      heartsContainer.appendChild(heart);
      }
      }
      // 生成气泡效果
      function createBubbles() {
      const bubblesContainer = document.getElementById('bubbles');
      const numberOfBubbles = 15;
      for (let i = 0; i < numberOfBubbles; i++) {
      const bubble = document.createElement('div');
      bubble.className = 'bubble';
      bubble.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
      bubble.style.width = Math.random() * 20 + 10 + 'px';
      bubble.style.height = bubble.style.width;
      bubble.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 6 + 's';
      bubble.style.animationDuration = (Math.random() * 4 + 6) + 's';
      bubblesContainer.appendChild(bubble);
      }
      }
      // 2025年倒计时
      function updateCountdown() {
      const now = new Date();
      const targetDate = new Date('2026-01-01T00:00:00');
      const timeDiff = targetDate - now;
      if (timeDiff > 0) {
      const days = Math.floor(timeDiff / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
      const hours = Math.floor((timeDiff % (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
      const minutes = Math.floor((timeDiff % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
      const seconds = Math.floor((timeDiff % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);
      document.getElementById('days').textContent = days.toString().padStart(2, '0');
      document.getElementById('hours').textContent = hours.toString().padStart(2, '0');
      document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0');
      document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0');
      } else {
      // 2025年已到来
      document.getElementById('countdown').innerHTML = '<div class="countdown-number" style="font-size: 2rem;">2025年</div><div class="countdown-label">已到来</div>';
      }
      }
      // 愿望清单交互
      function toggleWish(checkbox) {
      checkbox.classList.toggle('checked');
      const wishItem = checkbox.parentElement;
      wishItem.style.transform = checkbox.classList.contains('checked') ?
      'scale(1.02)' : 'scale(1)';
      }
      // 礼物盒动画
      function createGiftParticles() {
      const particlesContainer = document.getElementById('giftParticles');
      particlesContainer.innerHTML = '';
      for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
      const particle = document.createElement('div');
      particle.className = 'particle';
      // 随机方向
      const angle = (i / 12) * Math.PI * 2;
      const distance = 100 + Math.random() * 50;
      const tx = Math.cos(angle) * distance;
      const ty = Math.sin(angle) * distance;
      particle.style.setProperty('--tx', tx + 'px');
      particle.style.setProperty('--ty', ty + 'px');
      particle.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 0.5 + 's';
      particlesContainer.appendChild(particle);
      }
      }
      // 樱花粒子系统
      const canvas = document.getElementById('sakuraCanvas');
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      function resizeCanvas() {
      canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
      canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
      }
      resizeCanvas();
      window.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);
      const petals = [];
      const TOTAL_PETALS = 35;
      class Petal {
      constructor() {
      this.reset();
      }
      reset() {
      this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
      this.y = Math.random() * canvas.height - canvas.height;
      this.size = Math.random() * 12 + 8;
      this.speed = Math.random() * 1.2 + 0.3;
      this.sway = Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.5;
      this.swaySpeed = Math.random() * 0.015 + 0.005;
      this.angle = 0;
      this.rotation = Math.random() * 360;
      this.rotationSpeed = Math.random() * 0.8 - 0.4;
      this.opacity = Math.random() * 0.4 + 0.4;
      this.depth = Math.random(); // 景深
      }
      update() {
      this.y += this.speed * (1 + this.depth * 0.5); // 景深影响速度
      this.angle += this.swaySpeed;
      this.x += Math.sin(this.angle) * this.sway * (1 - this.depth * 0.3);
      this.rotation += this.rotationSpeed;
      if (this.y > canvas.height + 50) {
      this.reset();
      }
      }
      draw() {
      ctx.save();
      ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
      ctx.rotate(this.rotation * Math.PI / 180);
      ctx.globalAlpha = this.opacity;
      // 根据景深调整大小和模糊
      const scale = 0.7 + this.depth * 0.6;
      ctx.scale(scale, scale);
      if (this.depth > 0.7) {
      ctx.filter = 'blur(1px)';
      }
      // 绘制花瓣形状
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(8, -8, 16, 0, 0, 16);
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(-16, 0, -8, -8, 0, 0);
      // 使用莫兰迪色系
      const colors = ['#ffe4e1', '#f8e8e8', '#f0e0e0'];
      ctx.fillStyle = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.restore();
      }
      }
      // 初始化花瓣
      for (let i = 0; i < TOTAL_PETALS; i++) {
      petals.push(new Petal());
      }
      // 樱花动画循环
      function animateSakura() {
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
      petals.forEach(petal => {
      petal.update();
      petal.draw();
      });
      requestAnimationFrame(animateSakura);
      }
      animateSakura();
      // 滚动显现效果
      const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }
      });
      }, {
      threshold: 0.3,
      rootMargin: '0px 0px -100px 0px'
      });
      document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in-section').forEach(section => {
      observer.observe(section);
      });
      // 鼠标跟随效果
      const cursorContainer = document.getElementById('cursor-container');
      let cursorTrails = [];
      let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      mouseX = e.clientX;
      mouseY = e.clientY;
      // 创建鼠标跟随粒子
      const trail = document.createElement('div');
      trail.className = 'cursor-trail';
      trail.style.left = mouseX - 3 + 'px';
      trail.style.top = mouseY - 3 + 'px';
      cursorContainer.appendChild(trail);
      cursorTrails.push(trail);
      // 移除旧的粒子
      if (cursorTrails.length > 8) {
      const oldTrail = cursorTrails.shift();
      oldTrail.remove();
      }
      // 动画效果
      setTimeout(() => {
      trail.style.opacity = '0';
      setTimeout(() => trail.remove(), 300);
      }, 100);
      });
      // 点击涟漪效果
      document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const ripple = document.createElement('div');
      ripple.className = 'ripple';
      ripple.style.left = e.clientX - 25 + 'px';
      ripple.style.top = e.clientY - 25 + 'px';
      document.body.appendChild(ripple);
      setTimeout(() => ripple.remove(), 1000);
      });
      // 音频控制（使用 WebAudio 合成一个温柔的背景 pad，避免外部依赖）
      const audioControl = document.getElementById('audioControl');
      let isPlaying = false;
      let audioCtx = null;
      let padGain = null;
      let padOsc1 = null;
      let padOsc2 = null;
      let padFilter = null;
      let lfo = null;
      function createPad() {
      audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
      padGain = audioCtx.createGain();
      padGain.gain.value = 0.0;
      padGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
      padFilter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
      padFilter.type = 'lowpass';
      padFilter.frequency.value = 1200;
      padFilter.Q.value = 0.7;
      padFilter.connect(padGain);
      padOsc1 = audioCtx.createOscillator();
      padOsc1.type = 'sine';
      padOsc1.frequency.value = 220;
      padOsc1.detune.value = -10;
      padOsc1.connect(padFilter);
      padOsc2 = audioCtx.createOscillator();
      padOsc2.type = 'sine';
      padOsc2.frequency.value = 277.18; // slightly detuned interval
      padOsc2.detune.value = 10;
      padOsc2.connect(padFilter);
      // LFO to modulate filter for movement
      lfo = audioCtx.createOscillator();
      const lfoGain = audioCtx.createGain();
      lfo.type = 'sine';
      lfo.frequency.value = 0.07;
      lfoGain.gain.value = 300;
      lfo.connect(lfoGain);
      lfoGain.connect(padFilter.frequency);
      padOsc1.start();
      padOsc2.start();
      lfo.start();
      }
      function startPad() {
      if (!audioCtx) createPad();
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime;
      padGain.gain.cancelScheduledValues(now);
      padGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, now);
      padGain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.06, now + 1.2);
      }
      function stopPad() {
      if (!audioCtx) return;
      const now = audioCtx.currentTime;
      padGain.gain.cancelScheduledValues(now);
      padGain.gain.setValueAtTime(padGain.gain.value, now);
      padGain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, now + 1.2);
      // do not close context to allow restart quickly
      }
      audioControl.addEventListener('click', async () => {
      if (!isPlaying) {
      // 启动音频（需用户手势）
      try {
      startPad();
      } catch (e) {
      console.warn('音频启动失败', e);
      }
      audioControl.classList.add('playing');
      // 樱花短暂加速作为反馈
      petals.forEach(p => p.speed *= 1.5);
      setTimeout(() => petals.forEach(p => p.speed /= 1.5), 3000);
      } else {
      stopPad();
      audioControl.classList.remove('playing');
      }
      isPlaying = !isPlaying;
      });
      // 时间线动画观察器
      const timelineObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach((entry, index) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      setTimeout(() => {
      entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }, index * 200);
      }
      });
      }, {
      threshold: 0.5,
      rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
      });
      // 愿望清单动画观察器
      const wishObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach((entry, index) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      setTimeout(() => {
      entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }, index * 150);
      }
      });
      }, {
      threshold: 0.5,
      rootMargin: '0px 0px -30px 0px'
      });
      // 照片墙动画观察器
      const photoObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach((entry, index) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      setTimeout(() => {
      entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }, index * 100);
      }
      });
      }, {
      threshold: 0.3,
      rootMargin: '0px 0px -20px 0px'
      });
      // 礼物盒点击事件
      const giftBox = document.getElementById('giftBox');
      let giftClicked = false;
      giftBox.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (!giftClicked) {
      giftClicked = true;
      giftBox.classList.add('clicked');
      createGiftParticles();
      // 添加一些惊喜文字
      setTimeout(() => {
      const surpriseText = document.createElement('div');
      surpriseText.textContent = '🎉 惊喜！ 🎉';
      surpriseText.style.cssText = `
      position: fixed;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      font-size: 2rem;
      color: var(--misty-rose);
      z-index: 100;
      pointer-events: none;
      animation: fadeInOut 2s ease;
      text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
      `;
      document.body.appendChild(surpriseText);
      setTimeout(() => surpriseText.remove(), 2000);
      }, 500);
      }
      });
      // 最后的惊喜动画
      function triggerFinalSurprise() {
      // 增加樱花数量
      petals.length = 0;
      for (let i = 0; i < TOTAL_PETALS * 2; i++) {
      petals.push(new Petal());
      }
      // 显示爱心雨
      const heartRain = document.createElement('div');
      heartRain.style.cssText = `
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      z-index: 30;
      pointer-events: none;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,228,225,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
      `;
      for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
      const heart = document.createElement('div');
      // 使用小符号作为雨滴，语气更含蓄
      heart.textContent = ['♡', '❥', '❤', '❦'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)];
      heart.style.cssText = `
      position: absolute;
      left: ${Math.random() * 100}%;
      font-size: ${0.9 + Math.random() * 0.9}rem;
      animation: heart-fall ${Math.random() * 2 + 3}s linear forwards;
      opacity: 0.5;
      `;
      heartRain.appendChild(heart);
      }
      document.body.appendChild(heartRain);
      setTimeout(() => heartRain.remove(), 5000);
      }
      // 监听最后一张卡片的显示
      const finalCardObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting && !entry.target.dataset.surpriseTriggered) {
      entry.target.dataset.surpriseTriggered = 'true';
      setTimeout(triggerFinalSurprise, 1000);
      }
      });
      }, { threshold: 0.5 });
      // 页面加载后绑定观察器
      setTimeout(() => {
      finalCardObserver.observe(document.getElementById('card5'));
      }, 1000);
      // 页面加载时的初始化
      window.addEventListener('load', () => {
      createStars();
      createHearts();
      createBubbles();
      // 初始化观察器
      document.querySelectorAll('.timeline-item').forEach(item => {
      timelineObserver.observe(item);
      });
      document.querySelectorAll('.wish-item').forEach(item => {
      wishObserver.observe(item);
      });
      document.querySelectorAll('.photo-item').forEach(item => {
      photoObserver.observe(item);
      });
      // 启动倒计时
      updateCountdown();
      setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
      // 入场动画
      setTimeout(() => {
      document.getElementById('card1').classList.add('visible');
      }, 500);
      });
      // 防抖处理
      let resizeTimeout;
      window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
      clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
      resizeTimeout = setTimeout(resizeCanvas, 250);
      });
      // 添加CSS动画
      const style = document.createElement('style');
      style.textContent = `
      @keyframes fadeInOut {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.5); }
      50% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
      }
      @keyframes heart-fall {
      0% {
      transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(0deg);
      opacity: 1;
      }
      100% {
      transform: translateY(100vh) rotate(360deg);
      opacity: 0;
      }
      }
      `;
      document.head.appendChild(style);
      </script>
      </body>
      </html>
